mapper.sql: id, exam_id, student_id, objective_score, subjective_score, total_score, pass_flag, excellent_flag, rank_no, score_status, submit_time, publish_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: select segment_name, count from ( select '0-59' as segment_name, count(1) as count from exam_score where deleted = 0 and exam_id = #{examId} and total_score < 60 union all select '60-69' as segment_name, count(1) as count from exam_score where deleted = 0 and exam_id = #{examId} and total_score between 60 and 69 union all select '70-79' as segment_name, count(1) as count from exam_score where deleted = 0 and exam_id = #{examId} and total_score between 70 and 79 union all select '80-89' as segment_name, count(1) as count from exam_score where deleted = 0 and exam_id = #{examId} and total_score between 80 and 89 union all select '90-100' as segment_name, count(1) as count from exam_score where deleted = 0 and exam_id = #{examId} and total_score between 90 and 100 ) t
select count(1) from exam_score where deleted = 0 and exam_id = #{examId} and pass_flag = 1
select count(1) from exam_score where deleted = 0 and exam_id = #{examId} and excellent_flag = 1
select count(1) from exam_score where deleted = 0 and exam_id = #{examId}

select es.id, es.exam_id, e.exam_name, es.student_id, u.real_name as student_name, es.objective_score, es.subjective_score, es.total_score, es.pass_flag, es.excellent_flag, es.rank_no, es.score_status, es.publish_time from exam_score es inner join exam e on es.exam_id = e.id and e.deleted = 0 inner join sys_user u on es.student_id = u.id and u.deleted = 0 where es.deleted = 0 and es.exam_id = #{examId} order by es.rank_no asc, es.total_score desc
mapper.insert: insert into exam_score(exam_id, student_id, objective_score, subjective_score, total_score, pass_flag, excellent_flag, rank_no, score_status, submit_time, publish_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{examId}, #{studentId}, #{objectiveScore}, #{subjectiveScore}, #{totalScore}, #{passFlag}, #{excellentFlag}, #{rankNo}, #{scoreStatus}, #{submitTime}, #{publishTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update exam_score set objective_score = #{objectiveScore}, subjective_score = #{subjectiveScore}, total_score = #{totalScore}, pass_flag = #{passFlag}, excellent_flag = #{excellentFlag}, rank_no = #{rankNo}, score_status = #{scoreStatus}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
